title: ripidium procerum
intro: Ripidium procerum, also known as the creeping ripidium, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of ripidium procerum include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antifungal and antiviral activities. Ripidium procerum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, although its commercial availability and standardization are limited.
